NOAIS v0.7 fixture: TikTok comment thread

This page mimics the TikTok comment DOM. NOAIS will scan each [data-e2e="comment-item"] and append a badge.

fire

This app is so cool, the algorithm is on point

It is important to note that TikTok has fundamentally transformed the way in which users interact with short-form video content, providing an unprecedented level of algorithmic personalization that has redefined the modern media landscape
